title: Girl Playing Doll Cinematic Nostalgic
sourceTitle: Nanobanana Org 1430 Girl Playing Doll Cinematic Nostalgic
prompt: A cinematic video of a girl playing with a doll, depicted in soft, film-like color tones. It combines close-ups of her hands and the doll using shallow depth of field with medium shots capturing precious everyday moments, creating a nostalgic atmosphere with warm light and graininess.
originalPrompt: A cinematic video of a girl playing with a doll, depicted in soft, film-like color tones. It combines close-ups of her hands and the doll using shallow depth of field with medium shots capturing precious everyday moments, creating a nostalgic atmosphere with warm light and graininess.
